title: festuca duriuscula var. heterophylla
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. heterophylla is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, specifically a variety of the Festuca duriuscula species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula var. heterophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using it as a tincture, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
